items.title: Hantavirus quarantine ends for Americans held for six weeks in Nebraska
items.title_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends for Americans held for six weeks in Nebraska
items.body: The US health department said the enforced 42-day quarantine was necessary to protect the public Eight Americans quarantined for six weeks in Nebraska after they were exposed to a deadly hantavirus outbreak were released on Monday, including one who accused the government of holding her against her will . The US…
items.body_en: The US health department said the enforced 42-day quarantine was necessary to protect the public Eight Americans quarantined for six weeks in Nebraska after they were exposed to a deadly hantavirus outbreak were released on Monday, including one who accused the government of holding her against her will . The US…

items.title: Une brève histoire de l’ANDV, le mystérieux hantavirus des Andes
items.title_en: Une brève histoire de l’ANDV, le mystérieux hantavirus des Andes
items.body: Découvert en Argentine en 1995, l’ANDV est le seul hantavirus dont la transmission interhumaine a été clairement démontrée. Retour sur l’émergence d’un virus qui continue de mobiliser virologues et épidémiologistes.
items.body_en: Découvert en Argentine en 1995, l’ANDV est le seul hantavirus dont la transmission interhumaine a été clairement démontrée. Retour sur l’émergence d’un virus qui continue de mobiliser virologues et épidémiologistes.
